text: Here's what science actually says about gluconeogenesis. Gluconeogenesis is the process of generating glucose from non-carbohydrate sources. It primarily occurs in the liver and helps maintain blood sugar levels during fasting. Preliminary research suggests gluconeogenesis may also play roles in metabolic diseases. Understanding this process is key to managing health and nutrition. Curious about more science secrets? Hit that follow button!
